response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned software engineer with 15+ years of broad full-stack and systems experience, and his current role at re:cinq includes MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, which is directly relevant. However, the role requires 8+ years of production AI solution delivery, and his GenAI exposure appears limited to roughly one month (April 2025 onward). Python—a primary required language—is entirely absent from his skillset. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or enterprise customer-facing consulting, all of which are core to this Staff Forward Deployed Engineer position.
strengths: Hands-on Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and agentic workflow experience at re:cinq, directly matching a listed key technology
Staff-level seniority with TypeScript and Node.js depth validated across multiple employers over many years
Demonstrated community leadership through public conference talks, workshops, and open-source project ownership
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume, yet it is a primary required language for this role
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM observability and evaluation pipeline experience
GenAI-specific production experience is limited to approximately one month, far short of the 8-year minimum requirement
